problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: Combining Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
